semantic.role: Type definitions for the Spine manifest protocol, defining the structure of manifest files and sync state.
responsibilities: Define the SyncBlock interface for tracking synchronization state
Define the DocRef interface for referencing documents by locale and path
Define the FileStatus interface for tracking file-level status in the manifest
Define the SpineManifest interface as the root schema for the entire Spine project manifest
outOfScope: Business logic or processing of manifest contents
invariants: All manifest data must conform to the defined TypeScript interfaces
SyncBlock.lastSyncMode must be one of 'full', 'incremental', or 'unknown'
DocRef must always include a locale string and a path string

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable type contract for the Spine manifest format, enabling cross-module consistency and protocol versioning.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the v1.0.0 foundational release establishing the manifest schema as a core protocol type.

publicSurface.description: Interface describing the current synchronization state of the manifest, including the last sync timestamp, mode, reverse index completion flag, and count of indexed units.
Interface representing a reference to a localized document, containing a locale identifier and a file path.
Interface for tracking the status of a single file within the manifest, such as whether it is indexed, dirty, or unchanged.
Top-level interface for the Spine project manifest, aggregating all metadata, languages, rules, and sync state into a single schema object.

English.role: Type definitions for the Spine manifest protocol, defining the structure of manifest files and sync state.
responsibilities: Define the SyncBlock interface for tracking synchronization state
